blocked_reason: iOS arm64 Simulator linker incompatibility: CocosCreator prebuilt libssl.a/libcrypto.a use deprecated LC_VERSION_MIN_IPHONEOS (platform 2 = iOS device) instead of LC_BUILD_VERSION (platform 7 = iOS Simulator) required by Xcode 15+ SDK. This is an environment/toolchain issue, not a code gap. Web-mobile build confirmed working.

repairs_applied.fix: Created backend/src/routes/analytics.ts with fire-and-forget POST /analytics/crashes handler. Registered in server.ts under /v1 prefix.
Added POST /analytics/events handler to backend/src/routes/analytics.ts. Registered in server.ts under /v1 prefix.

repairs_applied.description: Client ShopScene sku_id='monthly_card' not in backend SKU_CONFIG — INVALID_SKU 400 on any monthly card purchase
repairs_applied.fix: Added monthly_card entry to backend/src/types/index.ts SKU_CONFIG: product_id=com.glowisland.iap.monthly_card, amount_cents=499, glowstone=30/day, is_monthly_card=true.

repairs_applied.description: Board node in Prototype.scene not instantiated at runtime — non-standard _id strings (proto-board-node-0001) caused CC3 to silently skip deserialization
repairs_applied.fix: Replaced all 3 non-standard _id values in Prototype.scene with proper 16-char hex UUIDs: Board node bd4a7c3e8f219d05, PrototypeBoard component bd4a7c3e8f219d06, UITransform bd4a7c3e8f219d07. Same fix applied to GameScene.scene GameController node (cd5e8f3a71b29406/07/08).

repairs_applied.description: _bootstrapHUD() produced no visible HUD nodes — root cause was Board node not instantiated from scene (CG-01)
repairs_applied.fix: Root cause fixed by CG-01. Also added find('Canvas') ?? director.getScene()?.getChildByName('Canvas') fallback in both _bootstrapHUD() methods (PrototypeBoard.ts:160, GameScene.ts:637) for robustness when externally instantiated.

repairs_applied.description: _bootstrapBackground() did not render — root cause was Board node not instantiated from scene (CG-01)
repairs_applied.fix: Root cause fixed by CG-01. Same canvas fallback added to _bootstrapBackground() in both files.

environment_blockers_detail.description: iOS arm64 Simulator build blocked: CocosCreator prebuilt native libs (libssl.a, libcrypto.a) use LC_VERSION_MIN_IPHONEOS (platform=iOS device) but Xcode 15+ linker requires LC_BUILD_VERSION (platform=iOS Simulator) for arm64-iphonesimulator target.
environment_blockers_detail.action: Cannot be fixed in code — requires CocosCreator engine update or use of older Xcode. Web-mobile build confirmed working as alternative smoke test target.
